channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Creating Crazy Horse: A Career-Defining Role
item.description: A grand sculpture in the Badlands, a powerful vision, a remarkable subject and artist.

item.title: The Muslim Brotherhood and Internal Threats
item.description: Recent events highlight the need to reassess the influence of this Islamist group.

item.title: Senator Ossoff Campaigns Against Trump for Reelection
item.description: Nearly a decade ago, Jon Ossoff was a 30-year-old Democratic candidate promising to cut wasteful spending.

item.title: China's Reusable Rocket Progress Requires Private Sector Action
item.description: Maintaining U.S. space leadership demands reducing bureaucratic delays for innovation.
